title: pseudostelis spiralis
intro: Pseudostelis spiralis is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pseudostelis spiralis include its potential to alleviate pain, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. In traditional herbal medicine, Pseudostelis spiralis is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and may be used to treat conditions such as fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
